p.seg: To all who shall see or listen to this writing Robert son of Alexander of London sends greeting in the Lord.

Know me to have allowed and by this my present charter to have made firm to God and to the church of blessed Mary at Melrose and to the monks serving God in that place, in free, pure and perpetual alms, the donation that my father made of his land situated in ‘Lekehalu’, which was given to him by Walter de Burdon and Mabel, his wife, as an exchange, just as my father’s charter bears witness.
I and my heirs shall warrant and defend the whole of the said land, with all its liberties and easements, against all men and women.
In testimony of this matter I have applied my seal to this document.
As witnesses, the lord Nicholas Corbet, the lord Robert of Nisbet, the lord Nicholas of Rutherford, and others.
